pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: Data Quality domain has low REG affinity (0.28) with insufficient regulatory signals. KSA text — 'Operate, maintain, and optimize data systems, databases, and infrastructure to ensure performance, a...' — describes competencies outside AI Provider Compliance Lead scope. Composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4048). REG roles interpret and apply technical concepts; they do not implement them.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in AI compliance role descriptions or regulatory certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Provider Compliance Lead focused on regulatory interpretation, compliance program management, and AI Act obligations.
